meta.title: Bach x Coltrane x Kuti x Takemitsu - AI Session
meta.description:
Try it out with this prompt:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/prompt-for-bach-134414200

Here the code to transform musical conversations into playable MIDI:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/code-to-musical-134614826

Bach, Coltrane, Fela Kuti, and Takemitsu reunite (through AI) to co-compose a new language of music.

Improvised. Unscripted. Unrepeatable.

A fully AI-generated piano piece, with each legend contributing a measure in their distinct voice.
No sheet music. No edits. Just pure algorithmic imagination channeling centuries of genius.

↪ Join the Nobodies Collective: https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

↪ contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com

#AI #aiart #aimusic #NobodyAndTheComputer #ChatGPT #AnthropicClaude #GoogleGemini #Deepseek #GenerativeAI #grok
